name: LEAST
description: Returns the smallest value among the given numeric expressions. NULL arguments are ignored; the result is NULL only if every argument is NULL.

parameters.name: expressions
parameters.description: One or more numeric expressions to compare

examples.title: Lowest of multiple prices
examples.description: Pick the smallest price across markets
examples.sql: SELECT LEAST(price_us, price_eu, price_uk) AS min_price FROM products

examples.title: Cap on a computed value
examples.description: Never let the rebate exceed the base price
examples.sql: SELECT LEAST(rebate, base_price) AS applied_rebate FROM orders

notes: Returns NULL only if every argument is NULL
All arguments should be numeric and have comparable types
